name: test_game
description: Ein atmosphärisches Spiel über das Finden der eigenen Flügel.
author: Lassandriel

scripts.build-exe: npm run build && powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force dist_electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path dist_electron; Copy-Item -Recurse dist dist_electron/dist; Copy-Item app-main.js, package.json, preload.js, splash.html dist_electron/; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path dist_electron/public/img -Force; Copy-Item public/img/Game_icon.ico dist_electron/public/img/; electron-packager dist_electron My-earned-Wings --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=BUILDS --overwrite --icon=dist_electron/public/img/Game_icon.ico"
